events.title: George Washington is inaugurated as the 1st president
John Adams becomes the 2nd president
Thomas Jefferson becomes the 3rd president
James Madison becomes the 4th president
James Monroe becomes the 5th president
John Quincy Adams becomes the 6th president
Andrew Jackson becomes the 7th president
William Henry Harrison dies after 31 days in office
James K. Polk becomes the 11th president
Abraham Lincoln becomes the 16th president
Andrew Johnson becomes president after Lincoln's death
James Garfield is assassinated in his first year
Theodore Roosevelt becomes president after McKinley's assassination
Woodrow Wilson becomes the 28th president
Franklin D. Roosevelt becomes the 32nd president
Harry Truman becomes president after FDR's death
Dwight D. Eisenhower becomes the 34th president
John F. Kennedy becomes the 35th president
Lyndon B. Johnson becomes president after JFK's assassination
Gerald Ford becomes president after Nixon resigns
Jimmy Carter becomes the 39th president
Ronald Reagan becomes the 40th president
Bill Clinton becomes the 42nd president
George W. Bush becomes the 43rd president
Barack Obama becomes the 44th president
Donald Trump becomes the 45th president
Joe Biden becomes the 46th president
